expectations.text: Acknowledges more than one handoff file exists
expectations.evidence: 'I found two handoff files for this repo... I want to confirm which one you want to resume from.'

expectations.text: Explicitly asks user which, or clearly states selection and reasoning (not silent)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly ASKS: 'Which handoff should I resume from — the 2026-07-09 retry-logic one... or the 2026-07-05 queue-skeleton one?' — the more cautious of the two acceptable behaviors, matches SKILL.md's stated preference to confirm rather than assume.
Ends on the disambiguating question; no code touched.
